verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Princes and paupers, Sons and daughters, Kneel at the throne of grace, Losers and winners, Saints and sinners, One day will see His face.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And we all bow down Kings will surrender their crowns And worship Jesus For He is the love Unfailing love He is the love of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Summer and winter The mountains and rivers Whisper our Savior's name Awesome and holy A friend to the lonely Forever His love will reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's the light of the world And Lord of the cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And we all bow down Kings will surrender their crowns And worship Jesus Worship Jesus Worship Jesus For He is love Unfailing love He is the Love of God
